customValue.fullName: 4: Proactively interested: came to brightwheel for payroll or planning to switch payroll providers in the next few months
customValue.label: 4: Proactively interested: came to brightwheel for payroll or planning to switch payroll providers in the next few months

customValue.fullName: 3: Reactively interested: wanted to learn more after learning brightwheel’s capabilities and partnership
customValue.label: 3: Reactively interested: wanted to learn more after learning brightwheel’s capabilities and partnership

customValue.fullName: 2: Not interested in using brightwheel’s payroll solution
customValue.label: 2: Not interested in using brightwheel’s payroll solution

customValue.fullName: 1: Ineligible: does not run their own payroll
customValue.label: 1: Ineligible: does not run their own payroll

GlobalValueSet.description: Used to guage customers interest level in our new payroll product
